$description: Paths within a target project scanned for Elixir source (.ex/.exs) files. Each entry may be a directory (walked recursively) or a single file. Universal defaults for Mix projects: lib/ always exists; test/support/ contains shared test helpers (ExUnit convention); test/test_helper.exs is the universal ExUnit bootstrap where test_utils / DB setup hooks are invoked. Missing paths are skipped silently.
